overall.description: Nighttime driving in heavy rain on a multi-lane highway, featuring tunnel passages and traffic interactions. The footage is from a racing simulation game showing first-person perspective from inside an Audi vehicle with active windshield wipers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a vehicle navigating a rain-slicked highway that transitions from open stormy roads through sheltered concrete passages. It begins with the car approaching a tunnel entrance under a toll gantry in heavy rain, before gliding into a well-lit concrete tunnel where it overtakes a green sedan. As the vehicle exits back into the open night, the scene shifts to a stretch of highway filled with trucks and sedans under tall street lights, eventually passing a yellow taxi before entering a brief, sheltered underpass. The camera then emerges from the cover to be overtaken by a police car with flashing emergency lights, moving toward another overhead gantry. Finally, the shot concludes as the vehicle continues through the downpour, passing bright headlights of oncoming traffic under circular traffic signs.
